message:
test(cli): add E2E CLI command execution tests [bd-3ox]

Add 30 E2E tests that spawn the actual fastmcp binary:
- Help command tests (main help, subcommand help)
- Version command test
- Exit code tests (missing args, invalid subcommand)
- Invalid option tests (format, transport, target)
- Install dry-run tests (claude, cursor, cline)
- List command tests (default, JSON format)
- Concurrent execution test
- Output format option tests

All tests pass, verify stdout/stderr output and exit codes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
